label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out this problem step by step. So, we have five main dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each of them starts with a partner, and then there are several partner swaps throughout the song. The question is asking who Alice is dancing with at the end, so I need to track the partner changes carefully. First, let me list out the starting partners to make sure I have them right. The problem says: - Alice is dancing with Jamie - Bob is dancing with Patrick - Claire is dancing with Ophelia - Dave is dancing with Melissa - Eve is dancing with Rodrigo So, initially, the partners are: Alice - Jamie Bob - Patrick Claire - Ophelia Dave - Melissa Eve - Rodrigo Now, the partner changes happen in a sequence. Let me go through each one step by step. First exchange: Dave and Bob switch partners. So, initially Dave is with Melissa, Bob is with Patrick. After they switch, Dave will have Patrick, and Bob will have Melissa. Let me write that down. After first exchange: Dave - Patrick Bob - Melissa The rest remain the same: Alice - Jamie Claire - Ophelia Eve - Rodrigo Second exchange: Claire and Dave switch partners. At this point, Claire is with Ophelia, Dave is with Patrick. So they switch. So Claire will now be with Patrick, and Dave will be with Ophelia. After second exchange: Claire - Patrick Dave - Ophelia Others: Alice - Jamie Bob - Melissa Eve - Rodrigo Third exchange: Eve and Alice switch partners. Eve is currently with Rodrigo, Alice is with Jamie. After switching, Eve will be with Jamie, and Alice will be with Rodrigo. After third exchange: Alice - Rodrigo Eve - Jamie Others: Claire - Patrick Dave - Ophelia Bob - Melissa Fourth exchange: Claire and Eve switch partners. Claire is with Patrick, Eve is with Jamie. After switching, Claire will be with Jamie, and Eve will be with Patrick. After fourth exchange: Claire - Jamie Eve - Patrick Others: Alice - Rodrigo Dave - Ophelia Bob - Melissa Fifth exchange: Alice and Eve switch partners. Currently, Alice is with Rodrigo, Eve is with Patrick. After switching, Alice will be with Patrick, and Eve will be with Rodrigo. After fifth exchange: Alice - Patrick Eve - Rodrigo Others: Claire - Jamie Dave - Ophelia Bob - Melissa So, at the end
